config.exam_name: 41 Data Warehousing using DBSQL

question.line: What is the primary purpose of Databricks SQL (DBSQL)?

options.A: To create Spark clusters for ETL pipelines only
options.B: To provide a SQL analytics service for querying data, building reports, dashboards, and connecting BI tools
options.C: To manage Unity Catalog permissions exclusively
options.E: To automate machine learning model training

question.line: What is the role of a SQL Warehouse in Databricks?

options.A: It stores Delta Lake tables permanently.
options.C: It serves as the compute engine that executes SQL queries.
options.D: It automatically creates dashboards from SQL queries.
options.E: It replaces the Databricks Control Plane.

question.line: Which type of SQL Warehouse is recommended for most workloads?
Which optimization technology is used by Serverless SQL Warehouses to accelerate SQL query execution?
What is the primary benefit of Predictive I/O in Serverless SQL Warehouses?

options.B: Faster data scanning and reduced query latency

question.line: How do SQL Warehouses improve support for many simultaneous users?

options.A: By limiting queries to a single cluster
options.B: By disabling autoscaling during peak workloads
options.C: By using multiple clusters and Intelligent Workload Management to distribute concurrent queries
options.D: By caching every table permanently in memory
options.E: By preventing users from running long-running queries

question.line: Which information is typically required for a BI tool such as Power BI or Tableau to connect to a SQL Warehouse?

options.C: Hostname, HTTP Path, and JDBC URL
options.D: Workspace ID and Spark version only

question.line: What information can users analyze in the Query Profile after executing a SQL query?

options.B: Query execution plan, execution time, memory usage, rows processed, and data scanned
options.E: Only user permissions for the query

question.line: What capability does the SQL Editor provide for saved queries?

options.B: Scheduling queries to run automatically for recurring reports and dashboards

question.line: Which statement correctly compares SQL Warehouses with All-Purpose Clusters?

options.A: SQL Warehouses are optimized for analytics (OLAP), BI connectivity, and concurrent SQL workloads, while All-Purpose Clusters are designed primarily for engineering and development.
options.B: All-Purpose Clusters provide better BI integration than SQL Warehouses.
options.C: SQL Warehouses cannot execute SQL queries from notebooks.
options.D: All-Purpose Clusters always use the Photon Engine by default.
options.E: SQL Warehouses are intended only for machine learning workloads.
